LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT 3910 24TH STREET LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT 3910 24TH STREET LLC'S ("LLC") MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AS TO PLAINTIFF ARMAN MELOYAN AND CROSS-DEFENDANT GSP PAINTING, INC. LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE FIRST, SECOND, AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION IN CRESTWOOD CONSTRUCTION INC.'S CROSS COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. SEE MINUTES IN WORD FORMAT FOR THE COURT'S RULING IN ITS ENTIRETY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 3910 24TH STREET LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Appearances via Zoom: Maria Caruana of the Law Offices of John A. Baird (925.945.4491) for moving party 3910 24th Street LLC; Nicholas Lunsford of Lorber Greenfield & Polito, LLP (415.986.0688) for opposing party Crest Wood Contractors, Inc.; Smbat Mamyan of A & M Law, APC (818.855.1858) for opposing party Arman Meloyan

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant 3910 24th Street LLC's ("LLC") motion for summary judgment is granted as to plaintiff Arman Meloyan and cross-defendant GSP Painting, Inc. LLC's motion for summary adjudication as to the first, second, and third causes of action in Crestwood Construction Inc.'s cross complaint is granted.

See minutes in Word format for the Court's ruling in its entirety.

Order signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)
